languages.text: "Время дипломатии, тактических хитростей и сделок закончилось. В бой! За династию фон Валанциус!" {n}Себериан выхватывает клинок из ножен и высоко вздымает его над головой.{/n}

traits.locale_text: [draft] Да и прошло время тактики и договоров, в бой!

languages.text: "The time for diplomacy, tactical trickery, and deals is over. To battle! For the von Valancius dynasty!" {n}Seberian snatches his blade from its sheath and raises it high above his head.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Время дипломатии, тактических хитростей и сделок закончилось. В бой! За династию фон Валанциус!" {n}Себериан выхватывает клинок из ножен и высоко вздымает его над головой.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The time for diplomacy, tactical trickery, and deals is over. To battle! For the von Valancius dynasty!" {n}Seberian snatches his blade from its sheath and raises it high above his head.{/n}
"The time for diplomacy, tactical trickery, and deals is over. To battle! For the von Valancius dynasty!" {n}Seberian snatches his blade from its sheath and raises it high above his head.{/n}
"The time for diplomacy, tactical trickery, and deals is over. To battle! For the von Valancius dynasty!" {n}Seberian snatches his blade from its sheath and raises it high above his head.{/n}

languages.text: “外交、谋略与谈判的时间结束了。是时候开战了！为了冯·瓦兰修斯王朝！”{n}塞贝里安猛然拔剑，高高举过头顶。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The time for diplomacy, tactical trickery, and deals is over. To battle! For the von Valancius dynasty!" {n}Seberian snatches his blade from its sheath and raises it high above his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “外交、谋略与谈判的时间结束了。是时候开战了！为了冯·瓦兰修斯王朝！”{n}塞贝里安猛然拔剑，高高举过头顶。{/n}

languages.text: « L'heure n'est plus à la diplomatie, aux ruses stratégiques ou aux accords. Aux armes ! Pour la dynastie von Valancius ! » {n}Seberian sort son épée de son fourreau et la brandit haut dans les airs.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The time for diplomacy, tactical trickery, and deals is over. To battle! For the von Valancius dynasty!" {n}Seberian snatches his blade from its sheath and raises it high above his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « L'heure n'est plus à la diplomatie, aux ruses stratégiques ou aux accords. Aux armes ! Pour la dynastie von Valancius ! » {n}Seberian sort son épée de son fourreau et la brandit haut dans les airs.{/n}

languages.text: «El momento de la diplomacia, las triquiñuelas tácticas y los tratos ha terminado. ¡A las armas! ¡Por la dinastía von Valancius!». {n}Seberian desenvaina su espada y la levanta sobre su cabeza.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The time for diplomacy, tactical trickery, and deals is over. To battle! For the von Valancius dynasty!" {n}Seberian snatches his blade from its sheath and raises it high above his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «El momento de la diplomacia, las triquiñuelas tácticas y los tratos ha terminado. ¡A las armas! ¡Por la dinastía von Valancius!». {n}Seberian desenvaina su espada y la levanta sobre su cabeza.{/n}

languages.text: "Diplomasi, taktiksel hileler ve anlaşmaların zamanı geçti. Savaşa! Von Valancius hanedanlığı için!" {n}Seberian, kılıcını kınından çıkarıp başının üzerine kaldırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The time for diplomacy, tactical trickery, and deals is over. To battle! For the von Valancius dynasty!" {n}Seberian snatches his blade from its sheath and raises it high above his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Diplomasi, taktiksel hileler ve anlaşmaların zamanı geçti. Savaşa! Von Valancius hanedanlığı için!" {n}Seberian, kılıcını kınından çıkarıp başının üzerine kaldırıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Die Zeit für Diplomatie, taktische Tricks und Abkommen ist vorbei. Auf in den Kampf! Für die Dynastie von Valancius!" {n}Seberian zieht seine Klinge und hebt sie hoch über seinen Kopf.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The time for diplomacy, tactical trickery, and deals is over. To battle! For the von Valancius dynasty!" {n}Seberian snatches his blade from its sheath and raises it high above his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Die Zeit für Diplomatie, taktische Tricks und Abkommen ist vorbei. Auf in den Kampf! Für die Dynastie von Valancius!" {n}Seberian zieht seine Klinge und hebt sie hoch über seinen Kopf.{/n}

languages.text: 「外交、戦術、取引の時間は終わった。戦場へ！フォン・ヴァランシウス家のために！」{n}セベリアンは刀を鞘から抜き、高く掲げた.{/n}
